mapper.select: SELECT * FROM evaluation_indicator ORDER BY is_system DESC, create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM evaluation_indicator WHERE teacher_id = 0 ORDER BY is_system DESC, create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation_indicator (name, teacher_id, description, category, default_weight, original_weight, is_system) VALUES (#{name}, #{teacherId}, #{description}, #{category}, #{defaultWeight}, #{originalWeight}, #{isSystem})
mapper.update: UPDATE evaluation_indicator SET default_weight = CASE WHEN is_system = 1 THEN original_weight ELSE 0 END
